title: HELP: Can't create a new item with column values

posts.author: misael_ec (Misael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im sending this query, but the response is a 505:

{“query”:“mutation{create_item(board_id: {{board_id}}, group_id: {{group_id}}, item_name: “My new item2”, column_values: {status: “Done”}) {id}}”}

Response:

{
“error_message” : “Internal server error”,
“status_code” : 500
}

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @misael_ec! Thanks so much for posting!

I would recommend reposting this in the developers section of the community where members of our tech team can help
